name: @unconfirmed/navi-sdk
description: Fork of naviprotocol/navi-sdk migrated to @mysten/sui v2 (gRPC). On-chain PTB shape is identical; the off-chain TypeScript surface uses v2 Core API method names + response shapes.
author: unconfirmed
//deps_note: Forked off `naviprotocol/navi-sdk@1.6.23`. Dependency changes from upstream: dropped `@mysten/sui.js` (v0.54 — bcs.de dynamic-string parser replaced with v2 typed-bcs structs in src/libs/bcs/); dropped `@pythnetwork/pyth-sui-js` (v2.4 — its SuiPythClient called v1 methods that don't exist on v2 gRPC clients) in favour of vendoring its 275-line client at src/libs/PythClient.ts and depending on `@pythnetwork/hermes-client` directly for VAA fetching.
